description.value:
You and your partner are so in tune with each other that you can move past each other with ease on the battlefield. You can end your movement sharing the same space as your bonded partner and they can do the same, even if you're the same size. As long as you're in the same square, you and your bonded partner can't be flanked by creatures of your level or lower.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.Effect: Back to Back Bond]

value.value: You have a bond with the Sympathetic Bond feat or dragonkin partner bond feature.
